title: Weak Authentication Mechanism
description: The system utilizes default configurations for authentication, potentially exposing it to brute-force attacks, credential stuffing, or password reuse vulnerabilities. Lack of multi-factor authentication (MFA) further exacerbates this risk. Attackers could impersonate legitimate users, gaining unauthorized access to sensitive data or functionality.
attack_vector: Exploitation of default credentials, password cracking, or credential stuffing attacks targeting the authentication service.
mitigations: Implement strong password policies (length, complexity, rotation).
Enforce Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for all users.
Regularly monitor authentication logs for suspicious activity and implement account lockout policies.
